title: Smaragda: I Got Thick Skin and I Can't Jump
overview: The film follows Smaragda, a middle-aged woman on a journey of self-discovery. After countless failed relationships and a stagnant career, she decided to jump into social media for some notion of visibility, which she definitely sucks at.
